title: Pan-Seared Snapper with Tunisian Spices
description: A flavorful French-inspired dish featuring seared snapper, infused with the aromas of Tunisian spices. Best served with a side of your favorite vegetables or a light salad.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spices
ingredients.notes: A blend of cumin, coriander, and paprika

ingredients.name: Fish seasoning
ingredients.notes: To enhance the flavor of the snapper

instructions: Season the snapper fillets with fish seasoning and salt.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the snapper fillets to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the Tunisian spices over the snapper.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as steamed vegetables or a light salad.
